game_info.title: Leo's Fortune - p5.js
game_info.concept: **Leo's Fortune:** Players control Leo, a sentient furball, navigating 24 hand-crafted platforming levels by using a virtual joystick on the left side of the screen for horizontal movement and swiping up on the right side to inflate, allowing Leo to float or roll faster, and swiping down to deflate for precise landings. The core gameplay involves solving physics-based puzzles by manipulating environmental objects, activating switches, and timing movements to avoid various traps and hazards. The objective in each level is to collect all scattered gold coins, which act as breadcrumbs left by a thief, to progress to the next stage. Upon completing all 24 levels, a Hard-core Mode is unlocked, challenging players to finish the entire game without dying, with Game Center leaderboards tracking fastest completion times for each level.
game_info.description: Take control of Leo, a delightfully fuzzy and sentient ball, on a quest to recover his stolen gold. Navigate through a hand-crafted level filled with treacherous traps and physics-based puzzles. Master Leo's unique abilities: inflate to float gracefully across gaps, and deflate to plummet with weight and precision. Collect coins along the path to increase your score and reach the treasure chest at the end to win!
game_info.controls:
- Arrow Left / Right: Move Leo horizontally
- Arrow Up (Hold): Inflate (Float / Glide / Jump)
- Arrow Down (Hold): Deflate (Heavy Fall / Dive)
- Enter: Start Game
- R: Restart Game
- Esc: Pause / Resume

TEST_1.test_description: Verify basic movement and gravity mechanics.
TEST_1.strategy_description: The bot will press the Right Arrow to move forward. It will verify that the x-coordinate increases. It will then hold Up Arrow to test floating mechanics, verifying that vertical velocity (vy) decreases or becomes negative (lift).
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player x-position increases over time. When Up is held, player stays airborne longer than when falling naturally.

TEST_2.test_description: Attempt to complete the level (Win State).
TEST_2.strategy_description: The bot uses a heuristic approach: Move Right continuously. If a wall is detected ahead or a gap is found in the floor via lookahead, the bot holds Up Arrow to float/jump. If high above a target platform, it presses Down to land quickly.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The player traverses the level, collecting coins, avoids dying to spikes, and reaches the goal trigger, changing game phase to GAME_OVER_WIN.

TEST_3.test_description: Verify hazard collision and Lose State.
TEST_3.strategy_description: The bot will locate the nearest spike hazard and intentionally move towards it without jumping.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Collision with the spike is detected, player health drops to 0, and game phase changes to GAME_OVER_LOSE.
